design_philosophy.mission: Bridge the gap between complex legal/financial services and the common man through a UI that feels both aspirational (Modern 3D) and safe (Grounded Earthy Tones).
design_philosophy.visual_style: Organic Professionalism. Combines the reliability of government/banking aesthetics with the engagement of modern fintech.
key_principles: Trust through Clarity: No hidden interactions. Everything is explicit.
Aspirational Realism: Use high-quality 3D and photography to show the 'better future' the services provide.
Mobile-First Density: Big touch targets, clear text hierarchy for small screens.
Language Equality: English, Hindi, and Marathi must have equal visual weight.

font_family.heading: Manrope, sans-serif
font_family.body: Noto Sans, Noto Sans Devanagari, sans-serif

rules: Use 'Noto Sans Devanagari' for all Hindi/Marathi text.
Body text must never be pure black (#000000). Use #1F2933.

usage_rules: Primary Green (#0F7A4A) is for trust actions (Submit, Call, Confirm).
Secondary Orange (#F39C12) is for attention (Alerts, Important Notices, 'New').
Background must remain #F5F7F9 to reduce eye strain.
Do NOT use gradients for main backgrounds. Use solid colors or subtle noise textures.

variants.primary: bg-[#0F7A4A] text-white hover:bg-[#0A5734] shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300 rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
variants.secondary: bg-white text-[#0F7A4A] border-2 border-[#0F7A4A] hover:bg-[#E7F5EE] rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-semibold
variants.outline: bg-transparent border border-gray-300 text-gray-700 hover:bg-gray-50 rounded-full px-6 py-2

card.default: bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-[0_4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.05)] border border-gray-100 hover:shadow-[0_12px_32px_rgba(15,122,74,0.15)] transition-all duration-300 overflow-hidden
card.interactive: group relative bg-white rounded-2xl p-8 hover:bg-[#0F7A4A] hover:text-white transition-colors duration-300 border border-gray-100

inputs.default: bg-gray-50 border-gray-200 focus:border-[#0F7A4A] focus:ring-[#0F7A4A] rounded-xl h-12 px-4

navigation.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-lg border-b border-gray-100

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

3d_effects.usage: Use CSS 3D Transforms for cards and Hero elements. Avoid heavy WebGL libraries if possible to maintain performance on low-end devices.

scroll_effects.fade_up: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} whileInView={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} viewport={{ once: true }}

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure all text on Green backgrounds is White. All text on Orange backgrounds must be Dark (#1F2933) or White (check APCA).
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#F39C12] on focus-visible.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use gradients for text.
Always check for missing images and provide a fallback color block.
Ensure the Language Switcher is always visible and accessible.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute.
